title: Coordinate
philosophy: This is an initiative commons — a shared map of what the community is working on, what is stuck, what needs people, and what has been learned.

board.title: Initiative Board
board.subtitle: What the community is holding and working on.

stateDescriptions.IMAGINED: A direction or question, not yet a defined initiative
stateDescriptions.EXPLORING: Active sense-making; the shape of the work is forming
stateDescriptions.PLANNED: Defined enough to invite specific contributions
stateDescriptions.INTEGRATING: Wrapping up; learning is being captured before closure

initiative.title: Title
initiative.description: What this initiative is trying to do
initiative.rdgDomainHint: Select the primary domain this initiative contributes to.
initiative.rdgGoalHint: Optionally, select specific goals within the domain.

updates.title: Updates
updates.helpNeeded: What help would actually change things (optional)

retrospective.title: Retrospective
retrospective.prompt: What we set out to do, what happened, what we'd do differently, what we're leaving in the commons for the next community facing something similar.
retrospective.publicNote: This retrospective lives in the commons.

backlog.title: Community Backlog
backlog.subtitle: Ideas and emerging work the community holds as worth attention. Sorted by community resonance — not top-down priority.

wip.title: WIP Limits
wip.description: Set work-in-progress limits for each column. Items cannot be moved into a column that has reached its limit.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.subtitle: Lean metrics and performance analysis
metrics.blockedItemsDescription: Items in the same state for more than 30 days
metrics.flowEfficiencyDescription: Percentage of active time vs total time in process

retrospectiveForm.submittedMessage: Thank you for sharing what was learned.
retrospectiveForm.placeholder: What we set out to do, what happened, what we'd do differently...

form.section1Subtitle: What are you calling this initiative?
form.whyPlaceholder: Why does this matter? What's the change you're seeking?
form.section2Subtitle: Connect this initiative to the regenerative development framework.
form.errorGeneric: Failed to create initiative. Please try again.
